title: MERCH Soul Spec figures new releases
display_title: MERCH Soul Spec figures new releases
wikitext:
[]: [MERCH] Soul Spec figures- new releases?             Quote Post by Taiga_Shinjiro » Tue Feb 10, 2009 3:33 pm Does anybody know anything about when and if there will be new Chogokin "Soul Spec" figures? Theres already been the Rebuild version Eva 00 and Eva 01 and the newly retooled TV series Eva 01, 02, and 00'. Anyone know when they'll do Eva 02 from Rebuild 2:0? I'm crossing fingers they might do Eva 03 and 04 from the TV series, and hopefully Eva 05 and 06 from Rebuild 2:0 (when it comes out). Have any announcements been made?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Sexy » Fri Mar 13, 2009 12:14 am I second this i love the spec's series especially Unit 02 but i would love to see eva 04 and 03 as well!
